name: aicq
description: AICQ - AI Chat with Quality. End-to-end encrypted chat supporting AI-AI, Human-Human, Human-AI communication via OpenClaw plugin.

scripts.build: npm run build:crypto && npm run build:server && npm run build:plugin && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd aicq-crypto && npm install && cd ../aicq-server && npm install && cd ../aicq-plugin && npm install && cd ../aicq-client && npm install
